title: Stop Watching Tutorials - Build These 4 Claude Projects to 10x Output
summary: Austin Marchese argues that learners should build practical projects with Claude Code rather than passively watching tutorials. He outlines four project categories: an AI Board of Advisors, a niche command center, an AI-optimized website, and an internal operating system, positioning hands-on building as superior to tutorial consumption.
